fixed_query:
SELECT
  u.email,
  c.card_name
FROM brex_data.user u
JOIN brex_data.card c
  ON u.id = c.owner_user_id
LIMIT 10

  u.email,
  c.card_name
FROM brex_data.user u
JOIN brex_data.card c
LIMIT 10

description: Mixing up columns from JOINed tables

  em.user_uri

JOIN calendly_data.event_membership em
  ON e.uri = em.event_uri
LIMIT 10

description: Invalid nested SELECT subquery: missing closing parenthesis

  WHERE status = 'active'
  LIMIT 5
)

description: Invalid subquery in SELECT: column not found in outer scope
fixed_query:
SELECT
  a.name,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM salesforce_data.contact c
    WHERE c.account_id = a.id
  ) AS contact_count
FROM salesforce_data.account a

  a.name,

description: Invalid multiple JOINs: ambiguous column reference
fixed_query:
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  ol.name,
  c.email
FROM shopify_data.order o
JOIN shopify_data.order_line ol ON o.id = ol.order_id
JOIN shopify_data.customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  id AS order_id,
  ol.name,
  c.email
FROM shopify_data.order o
JOIN shopify_data.order_line ol ON o.id = ol.order_id
JOIN shopify_data.customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: column reference "id" is ambiguous
  Position: 128

description: Invalid CTE: referencing undefined CTE name
fixed_query:
WITH recent_customers AS (
  SELECT id, email
  FROM stripe_data.customer
  WHERE created > '2023-01-01'
)
SELECT rc.email, COUNT(ch.id)
FROM recent_customers rc
LEFT JOIN stripe_data.charge ch ON rc.id = ch.customer_id
GROUP BY rc.email
broken_query:
WITH recent_customers AS (
  SELECT id, email
  FROM stripe_data.customer
  WHERE created > '2023-01-01'
)
SELECT rc.email, COUNT(ch.id)
FROM customers rc
LEFT JOIN stripe_data.charge ch ON rc.id = ch.customer_id
GROUP BY rc.email
error_message:
ERROR: relation "customers" does not exist
  Position: 261
